action.reasoning: Observation: Multi-scale inference provided a solid boost (+0.006 mIoU), but took ~65 minutes. Analysis: We have 6.5 hours left. Training for 40 epochs took 2.2 hours. We can train for another 80 epochs (~4.4 hours) to further improve the model, as SegFormer typically trains for 160k iterations (we are currently at ~25k). I will also optimize predict.py by batching the original and flipped images together, which should halve the inference time. Decision: Update train.py to clean up old checkpoints to save disk space, optimize predict.py, and launch training for 80 more epochs starting from epoch_39.pt. After training, submit an evaluation on the final checkpoint.
